data.title: Update ticket-cli-reference.md to document --tags flag on ticket create
data.description:
## Context

Add --tags flag documentation to the ticket create section in plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md. This follows .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md conventions.

## What to change

In plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md, update the 'create' subcommand section (around line 126):

1. **Synopsis line**: Add [--tags <tag1,tag2>] to the command:
   `.claude/scripts/dso ticket create <ticket_type> <title> [--parent <id>] [--priority <n>] [--assignee <name>] [-d/--description <text>] [--tags <tag1,tag2>]`

2. **Arguments table**: Add new row after the -d row:
   | `--tags` | No | Comma-separated list of tags to attach to the ticket at creation time (e.g., `CLI_user`) |

3. **Behavior section**: Add bullet:
   - Tags are stored as a list on the ticket; use --tags to set them atomically at creation time

4. **Example**: Add example showing CLI_user usage:
   ```
   $ .claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug "User reported: Login fails on mobile" --tags CLI_user
   ab12-cd34
   ```

## Files to modify

- plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md --tags appears in the synopsis line for ticket create
  Verify: grep -q '\-\-tags' plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md Arguments table includes --tags row
  Verify: grep -A5 'Arguments' plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md | grep -q 'tags'
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md includes CLI_user example in the create section
  Verify: grep -q 'CLI_user' plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md
- [ ] bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-cli-reference-md-tags.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py exits 0
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
